metadata.title: systemic-tau-formal: Machine-verifiable Systemic Tau (τₛ) and RECD
metadata.description:
systemic-tau-formal v0.1.8 is an open monorepo for machine-checkable formalization and reproducible reference code of the Systemic Tau (τₛ) paradigm and the Discrete Extramental Clock (RECD).

What is new in v0.1.8 (formal track, post-v0.1.7 packs)

  • Zero sorry and zero research axiom under SystemicTau/. Former open goals are discharged only as named cited constructions / laboratory packages, not as classical dynamical theorems from bare ordinal+smooth hypotheses.
  • Reduction: continuum realizers via lookupTent; tent lab continuum (goal 2); non-tent continuum return tauReturnFour (logistic conjugacy on the coherence interval); composite ★ uses the non-tent return + refined FeigenbaumUniversal (operational δ-band + quadratic tip). Tent composite retained as alternate.
  • Analytic: geometric cascade with exact ratio δ_op; ε–N ↔ Tendsto bookkeeping; toy cascade honesty blocks (does not approach δ).
  • Logistic scale-ID (FeigenbaumLogistic): logistic-anchored parameter sequence shares ratios with the geometric model (landmarks r₀=2, r₁=3); not termwise identification with classical superstable roots.
  • C² / Schwarzian (FeigenbaumSchwarzian): formal derivatives of the logistic map; HasC2QuadraticTip; Schwarzian ≤ 0 off the critical point; FeigenbaumUniversalC2. Not Mathlib C²-open renormalization / universality.
  • Docs honesty board: docs/FORMAL_OBLIGATIONS.md §7 splits historical v0.1.7 from this pin; aligned STATUS.md / FEIGENBAUM_STATUS.md.

Still research-scale (not closed classical theorems)

  • Termwise / asymptotic logistic superstable roots
  • Mathlib C²-open renorm fixed point / universality
  • Field-derived continuum return of τₛ (not a cited lab map)
  • Unique closed-form τ_ch = f(δ) beyond finite simple non-identities
  • Stronger multi-site empirical P1/P4 discharge

Stack

  • Lean 4.14 + Mathlib: operational gate g(τₛ), band lemmas, Feigenbaum lab/construction track (modules: Reduction, Analytic, Tendsto, Schwarzian, Logistic).
  • Python reference core + golden rational bridge + pytest; C3 synthetic kits; first-return twin; Aedes field intake path.
  • Public falsifiable predictions, experimental protocol, epistemic labels, Stress-Test 2026 board.

Companion production package: PyPI systemictau. Prior corpus DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.20576241.

Epistemic honesty: operational thresholds 0.50 / 0.41 are Feigenbaum-motivated defaults; ε–N↔Tendsto is interface equivalence, not a proof that physical cascades limit to δ≈4.669… . Lab maps (tent / tauReturn) are not claimed as field τₛ dynamics. Scale-ID is not termwise superstable identification.

creators.name: Padilla-Villanueva, Johel
creators.affiliation: University of Puerto Rico, Medical Sciences Campus

metadata.notes: CI: GitHub Actions (pytest + lake build). Verify: clone, lake build, pytest -q. Concept DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.21516059. Formal obligations map: docs/FORMAL_OBLIGATIONS.md. Zero sorry / zero research axiom under lean/SystemicTau/.
